notableEvents.label: Jose Trevino reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Jose Trevino reaches on a fielding error by right fielder Cam Smith. Spencer Steer to 3rd. Will Benson to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Matt McLain singles on a line drive to left fielder Zach Cole. Spencer Steer scores. Will Benson scores. Jose Trevino to 3rd. Matt McLain to 2nd. Throwing error by left fielder Zach Cole.

notableEvents.label: Dane Myers pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dane Myers flies out to center fielder Brice Matthews.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Reds challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: pitcher Chase Burns picks off Jose Altuve at 1st on throw to first baseman Spencer Steer.

notableEvents.label: Isaac Paredes GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Isaac Paredes grounds into a double play, second baseman Matt McLain to shortstop Elly De La Cruz to first baseman Spencer Steer. Yordan Alvarez out at 2nd. Isaac Paredes out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jose Trevino reaches on a fielding error by right fielder Cam Smith. Spencer Steer to 3rd. Will Benson to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Matt McLain singles on a line drive to left fielder Zach Cole. Spencer Steer scores. Will Benson scores. Jose Trevino to 3rd. Matt McLain to 2nd. Throwing error by left fielder Zach Cole.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Matt McLain singles on a line drive to left fielder Zach Cole. Spencer Steer scores. Will Benson scores. Jose Trevino to 3rd. Matt McLain to 2nd. Throwing error by left fielder Zach Cole.
